scripts.dtif:diff: dtifx diff compare ops/artifacts/diff/baseline.dtif.json tokens/catalog.tokens.json --format json --output ops/artifacts/diff/report.json && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const report='ops/artifacts/diff/report.json';const from='file://'+process.cwd().split(path.sep).join('/');const to='file:///workspace/dtifx-example';fs.writeFileSync(report,fs.readFileSync(report,'utf8').replaceAll(from,to));" && dtifx diff compare ops/artifacts/diff/baseline.dtif.json tokens/catalog.tokens.json
scripts.dtif:audit: dtifx audit run --config audit/dtif-audit.config.mjs --reporter json --reporter markdown --out-dir ops/artifacts/audit
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run design-lint
